title: phase 1 тАФ ingest + themen-browser + snippets
description:
## Summary

Phase 1 of the coaching knowledge pipeline (spec PR #633, plan PR #634).

- **DB schema** тАФ new `coaching` schema with `books`, `snippets`, `snippet_clusters` tables. FK back to existing `knowledge.collections` / `knowledge.chunks`.
- **Ingest pipeline** тАФ `task coaching:ingest -- <file> <slug>` extracts PDF/EPUB тЖТ chunks via existing `chunkText()` тЖТ embeds via Voyage тЖТ upserts into `knowledge.*` + `coaching.books` in one shot. New deps: `pdf-parse`, `epub2`, `tsx`.
- **CRUD module** тАФ `website/src/lib/coaching-db.ts` with vitest coverage via `pg-mem` (no live DB required).
- **API** тАФ six endpoints under `/api/admin/coaching/*` (books, snippets, clusters), gated on existing `getSession()` + `isAdmin()`.
- **Admin UI** тАФ `/admin/knowledge/books` list page + `/admin/knowledge/books/[id]` themen-browser with new `BookReader.svelte` (infinite-scroll, mouse-selection тЖТ snippet modal).
- **E2E** тАФ 5 unauth-path Playwright checks under `tests/e2e/specs/fa-coaching-knowledge.spec.ts`.

**No AI drafting yet** тАФ that's Phase 3. **No publish-cascade yet** тАФ that's Phase 2. Phases 2тАУ5 each get their own plan + PR.

9 commits on this branch; the plan was followed task-by-task with TDD where applicable.

## Test plan

- [x] `npx vitest run src/lib/coaching-db.test.ts` тАФ 7/7 pass via pg-mem
- [x] `node --test scripts/coaching/lib-extract.test.mjs` тАФ 2/2 pass (PDF fixture self-skips when not present)
- [x] `npx tsx scripts/coaching/ingest-book.mts` (no-args) тАФ prints Usage, exit 2
- [x] `astro check` тАФ no new errors introduced (pre-existing 17 errors unaffected)
- [ ] Manual: `task coaching:ingest -- coaching-sources/<sample>.epub sample` against a live cluster (deferred тАФ no test EPUB fixture in repo yet)
- [ ] Authenticated Playwright flow (deferred тАФ needs admin seed + sample book)

ЁЯдЦ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
